data.title: Add --ticket-id arg to harvest-worktree.sh and write WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete in _harvest_cleanup
data.description:
## Story
d2ef-92cc — WORKTREE_TRACKING :complete and :landed

## testing_mode
GREEN

## What
Modify `plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh` to:
1. Accept new optional `--ticket-id <id>` argument
2. In `_harvest_cleanup()` (called via ERR/EXIT/TERM/INT/HUP trap), when TICKET_ID is set:
   - outcome=merged when `_harvest_exit_code` is 0
   - outcome=discarded when non-zero
   - Write WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete comment: `.claude/scripts/dso ticket comment $TICKET_ID "WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD) outcome=$outcome timestamp=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"`
3. When --ticket-id not provided: write nothing (backward compat, fail-silent)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ed2b-9e72 tests pass GREEN (test_complete_comment_written_on_success and test_complete_comment_written_on_failure)
- [ ] No regression in existing test-harvest-worktree.sh tests
- [ ] Script handles missing --ticket-id silently (no error, no output)
- [ ] WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete written on both success and failure paths via _harvest_cleanup trap
